title: peucedanum lateriflorum
intro: Peucedanum lateriflorum, also known as Chinese angelica or Qiang Huo, is a plant species belonging to the carrot family (Apiaceae). It is primarily used in traditional Chinese medicine, valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antispasmodic, and antiseptic properties. The plant is believed to offer various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving rheumatic pain, and improving circulation. In herbal preparations, Peucedanum lateriflorum is often combined with other herbs and can be consumed as a tea, capsule, or tincture to promote overall well-being.
